summary: Backend refactor verification - all 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend e2e flow working correctly: home loads, letter selection shows all 60 letters, study session starts and displays cards with correct/wrong buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored into modular layers (config, database, data, models, repositories, services, routes). All API endpoints verified: GET /api/alphabet (60 letters, correct fields), GET/POST /api/progress (correct format, persistence, reset), GET /api/tts/:id (200 for valid, 404 for invalid). Frontend home->select letters->study session e2e flow fully working.
